isIslamicCivilLeapYear.desc: Returns true when a tabular Islamic civil year is a leap year.

returns.desc: True when the year contains a leap day in Dhu al-Hijjah.

islamicCivilDaysInMonth.desc: Returns days in a tabular Islamic civil month.

month.desc: Islamic civil month number, where Muharram is `1`.

islamicCivilDaysInMonth.tsSignature: function islamicCivilDaysInMonth(year: number, month: number): number

returns.desc: Number of days in the month, or `0` for an invalid month number.
